title: calamintha villosa
intro: Calamintha villosa, also known as Mountain Melissa or Whipping Thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamintha villosa include soothing digestive issues, relieving headaches and migraines, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Calamintha villosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
